name: Auth — Cognito
description: Cognito User Pool with two app clients (web for browser auth, service for machine-to-machine), resource server with custom scopes, hosted UI domain, and user groups. Supports MFA, OAuth 2.0 authorization code and client_credentials flows.

resources.name: Cognito User Pool
resources.description: User directory with email sign-in, password policy, MFA, and account recovery

resources.name: Web App Client
resources.description: Browser/SPA client with OAuth2 authorization code flow (no secret)

resources.name: Service App Client
resources.description: Machine-to-machine client with client_credentials flow (with secret)

resources.name: Resource Server
resources.description: OAuth2 resource server defining custom API scopes (invoke, manage, read)

resources.name: Hosted UI Domain
resources.description: Cognito hosted sign-in UI (prefix or custom domain)

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Project name used for resource naming

parameters.name: mfa_configuration
parameters.description: MFA configuration: OFF, OPTIONAL, or ON

parameters.name: callback_urls
parameters.description: OAuth callback URLs for the web client

parameters.name: logout_urls
parameters.description: OAuth logout URLs for the web client

parameters.name: resource_server_identifier
parameters.description: Identifier for the OAuth2 resource server
